summary: M449 — Reverted M448 spell-rail-absolute change (broke desktop). Real fix for mobile bottom-panel expansion: when the player is in auto-combat mode (the default), the active-actor card is now display:none even when 'mobile-selected'. Previously we hid the card's CONTENTS (M444) but the card element itself still claimed padding inside .ev-hud__card-row, which is the empty-space expansion the user kept seeing each hero turn. Manual-combat mode still shows the card (needed for skill picking). Desktop unchanged.
